title: Clarify how starter-pack guidance composes a bounded work slice
problem: The starter-pack explains individual guides and templates, but new adopters may still miss how framing, decision, execution, handoff, and learning fit together as one bounded unit of work.
objective: Add clearer operational guidance so a reusable work slice can be understood as a composed pattern without introducing a new core contract.
constraints: Keep the change documentation-first and reversible.
Reuse existing contracts instead of introducing a new work-slice schema.
Keep the operational pattern small enough to teach quickly.
success_criteria: The work-slice concept is understandable as a composed operational pattern.
The slice remains explicitly outside the core contracts.
The resulting materials point to validation and handoff expectations.
validation_plan: Manual consistency review across docs and starter-pack materials
